hero.description: We provide premium construction and engineering services with over {{years}} years of expertise in building exceptional structures.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Complete solutions for your projects: design, planning, construction, renovation, technical systems and maintenance. Multidisciplinary expertise mobilized at every stage to ensure performance, quality and safety.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to build your future with us?
ctaBanner.desc: Take the first step toward a successful project: partner with XBuild and benefit from our expertise, our commitment to quality, and tailor-made solutions designed for your success.

items.title: Design & Engineering
items.desc: Our design and engineering services cover every stage of your project, from feasibility studies to detailed execution planning. We produce 2D/3D models and technical simulations to optimize performance before construction begins. Our multidisciplinary team coordinates structural, civil, utility and electrical work for cost-effective, on-time solutions.

items.title: Building Planning
items.desc: We guide your project from concept to final blueprint, with precise planning of schedules, budgets and resources. Every stage is anticipated to ensure a smooth construction process, from design through turnkey delivery.

items.title: General Contracting
items.desc: As general contractor, we manage your entire site: coordinating teams, subcontractors and suppliers, while meeting deadlines, budgets, and the strictest quality and safety standards.

items.title: Renovation & Modernization
items.desc: Our teams bring existing structures back to life through renovation and modernization works. We replace outdated components, improve energy efficiency and modernize spaces, while meeting current environmental and safety standards.

items.title: Electrical & Technical Systems
items.desc: We design and install complete electrical and technical systems, from distribution panels to low-voltage networks. Our solutions include building automation and management to optimize energy performance and occupant comfort.

items.title: Maintenance & Technical Support
items.desc: We provide preventive and corrective maintenance programs to ensure the longevity and reliability of your facilities. Our experts also offer technical support and advice throughout your project, from concept to operation.

process.title: How It Works
process.description: Our work process ensures every project is carried out with precision, from the first consultation to final delivery, on time and within budget.

items.title: Consultation & Analysis
items.desc: We start by gaining a clear understanding of your needs and goals through an in-depth consultation, gathering all the information required for the project.

items.title: Design & Planning
items.desc: Our team designs tailored solutions, followed by detailed planning and precision engineering to ensure the project's feasibility.

items.title: Implementation & Execution
items.desc: We begin construction and assembly work, making sure every element precisely matches your requirements.

items.title: Testing & Delivery
items.desc: Final quality checks and tests are carried out to ensure the highest standards are met before delivering the completed project.

stats.title: Our Services Meet The Highest Standards.
stats.description: With over {{years}} years of experience, XBuild continues to set the benchmark for industrial construction quality and innovation.

items.text: XBuild delivered our facility on time and exceeded every quality benchmark. Their engineering team is truly world-class.
Working with XBuild was a seamless experience. Professional, reliable, and committed to excellence in every detail.
Our industrial complex was completed under budget and ahead of schedule. Exceptional craftsmanship and management.

footer.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to get the latest news from XBuild.

whyChooseUs.title: Why Choose Us?
whyChooseUs.description: At XBuild, we are driven by excellence, innovation and a deep understanding of construction challenges. With over 25 years of expertise, we design and deliver high-performance solutions tailored to your operational needs. Our commitment to quality, safety and client satisfaction ensures the lasting success of every project.

items.title: Proven Expertise
items.desc: Over 25 years of experience in construction, delivering proven and reliable engineering solutions.

items.title: Comprehensive Solutions
items.desc: From planning to execution, we provide complete management of your construction projects.

items.title: Tailored Approach
items.desc: Every solution is adapted to your specific needs, maximizing efficiency and client satisfaction.
